title: Journey Governance
description: Schema for the generic journey-tier governance rules — rules shared by every multi-step journey (checkout, onboarding, wizards). A named journey opts in with journey.extends: [journey]; a named-journey rule can supersede a generic journey rule via refines (lex specialis).

$schema.description: Path to this JSON Schema for IDE validation and autocomplete.

scope.description: Scope code that prefixes every rule id in this file (e.g. 'JRN').

description.description: What a journey is and what its shared rules govern.

triggers.description: Base keywords that resolve these rules for any journey-shaped task. The generator also unions in the keywords of every named journey that extends this tier.

title.description: Short human sentence naming the rule.

statement.description: The binding text of the rule.

severity.description: How hard the rule pushes back. A named journey may refine this to a stricter severity.

appliesWhen.description: The trigger / jurisdiction. Common keys: scope, step.

status.description: Mark a rule repealed: it stays in the authored YAML (its citation is retired, never reused) but is dropped from the generated governance index.
